attractions.name: Musée des Beaux-Arts de Lyon
attractions.description: One of France's largest fine arts museums, housed in a 17th-century abbey

attractions.name: Vieux Lyon & Traboules
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage Renaissance quarter with hidden passageways (traboules)

attractions.name: Parc de la Tête d'Or
attractions.description: Massive urban park with free zoo, botanical garden, boating lake

attractions.name: Les Halles de Lyon Paul Bocuse
attractions.description: Legendary covered food market with gourmet stalls, charcuterie, cheese, pastries

attractions.name: Basilique Notre-Dame de Fourvière
attractions.description: Iconic hilltop basilica with panoramic views over Lyon, stunning mosaics
attractions.frequency: Open daily, funicular access from Vieux Lyon

attractions.name: Opéra National de Lyon
attractions.description: World-class opera house with ballet and concert performances

attractions.name: Musée des Confluences
attractions.description: Striking contemporary science and anthropology museum at the confluence of rivers

attractions.name: Monts du Lyonnais
attractions.description: Rolling hills west of Lyon for hiking, cycling, and countryside escapes

attractions.name: Centre Commercial Part-Dieu
attractions.description: One of Europe's largest urban shopping centers with 260+ shops

attractions.name: Berges du Rhône
attractions.description: 5km riverside promenade with bars, food trucks, and weekend social gatherings
